title: 12 PCS Colour Your Own Bag, Party Bags for Kids Party Pre Filled Non-Woven, Kids Party Bags for DIY, with 2 Stacking Crayons(12 Colours in 1), as Return Gifts for Birthday Party Kids
features: 【Drawstring Bag Crayon Set】Contains 12 black drawstring children's cloth bags, measuring 28×32cm, and comes with 2 stackable party bag crayons, which is enough for children to enjoy the fun of coloring their own school bags

【High-quality Materials】Our kids party bag are made of spunbond non-woven fabric, which is strong and not easy to tear, with smooth lines and clear printing. The shell of the crayon is made of high-quality plastic, which is durable and comfortable to hold

【Variety of Styles】These painting party bags for children's parties contain 12 different pre-printed patterns, shipped with 12 patterns in almost every parcel, individual parcels may have duplicate patterns

【Multi-function】Our crayons are 12 colors in one, and one crayon can meet the children's painting needs. The kids party bags can be used as a small backpack to store and transport children's toys, candies and other items

【Innovative Small Gifts for Children】This party bags for kids party pre filled is fun and easy to draw, popular with boys and girls, and is very suitable for kindergartens, schools, birthday parties and other occasions. It is a creative return gifts for birthday party kids
description: 12PCS Colour Your Own Bag, Non-woven Party Bags for Kids Party Pre Filled, Drawstring Kids Party Bags, with 2 Stacking Crayons(12 Colours in 1), for Return Gifts for Birthday Party Kids Functions: This Children'S Painting Cloth Bag is Printed with Various Cartoon Blank Patterns, Which Can be Doodled with The 12-Color Crayons Provided. The Colored Cloth Bag Can be Used as a Backpack to Store and Transport Children'S Toys, Candies and Other Items. Brand: AYSYR Colour: White Weight: 574g Material: Spunbond Non-woven Fabric, Plastic Sizes: 320×225×53mm Package Includes: 12 × Drawstring Kids Party Bags 2 × Stacking Crayons Applicable Scenarios: Suitable for Kindergartens, Schools, Birthday Parties and Other Occasions, it is a Good Creative Souvenir for Children.
